meta.title: Gerlinde Versyck – Frontend Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of Gerlinde Versyck, a passionate frontend developer building responsive, animated web experiences.

hero.description: I craft beautiful, responsive web experiences with clean code and thoughtful design.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I'm a passionate frontend developer with a love for creating elegant, user-friendly web applications.
about.p2: With experience in modern web technologies, I focus on delivering high-quality, performant solutions that delight users.

project1.title: Portfolio Site
project1.desc: A responsive one-page portfolio built with vanilla HTML, CSS and JavaScript, featuring animations and i18n support.

project2.title: Weather App
project2.desc: An interactive weather dashboard that fetches live data from a public API and displays animated forecasts.

project3.title: Task Manager
project3.desc: A feature-rich task management app with drag-and-drop, local storage persistence and theme switching.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it. Let's build something great together.

footer.text: Built with ♥ using vanilla HTML, CSS & JavaScript
